other_observers: Many , Joe Roller , Steve Stachowiak , et al; Not original finder
description: Large all white owl , with black barring on lower chest , light black spotting on wing coverts and a few black spots arranged in a horizontal line on top of head.In flight underwings all white.Behaviors: Resting on ground , often with eyes closed and made one brief flight of about 50 yards before settling on ground.Call: NonePlumage: adult female or imm male
photographer: Photographer: John Drummond, John Drummond, John Drummond
